summary: Iteration 46: Purchase History Feature Testing. All 7 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified purchase history page, PDF download, and navigation links from wallet and buy-tokens pages. All features working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Purchase history endpoint correctly returns both Stripe and legacy purchases in unified format
PDF receipt generation uses fpdf library and includes proper transaction details, buyer info, and branding
Receipt endpoint correctly validates user ownership (returns 404 for other users' receipts)
Frontend purchase-history.tsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing
Navigation links to purchase history are present in both wallet.tsx and buy-tokens.tsx
seed_data_creation: None - used existing purchase data for cliente@teste.com (6 purchases)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase history feature fully tested. Features verified: (1) GET /api/payments/purchase-history - returns list of completed purchases with unified format (Stripe + legacy), (2) GET /api/payments/receipt/{transaction_id}/pdf - generates valid PDF receipt with proper content-type and PDF magic bytes, (3) Receipt endpoint returns 404 for invalid transaction IDs, (4) Receipt endpoint requires auth and validates user ownership, (5) Frontend /purchase-history page shows summary cards (count, tokens, total) and purchase list with download buttons, (6) Wallet tab (Creditos) has 'Ver historico de compras' link that navigates to /purchase-history, (7) Buy-tokens page has 'Ver historico de compras' link. PDF download tested and verified - file downloads with correct filename pattern 'recibo_{transaction_id}.pdf'. Login flow uses localStorage key 'session_token' for AsyncStorage on web.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/payments/purchase-history: Returns list of completed purchases - WORKING
backend_endpoints.user_ownership: Users can only access their own receipts - WORKING

frontend_pages./purchase-history: Shows summary cards and purchase list with download buttons - WORKING
frontend_pages.wallet_link: 'Ver historico de compras' link in Creditos tab - WORKING
frontend_pages.buy_tokens_link: 'Ver historico de compras' link in buy-tokens page - WORKING
